ai.notes: The form uses Lever's standard application structure. The 'Current location' field includes a hidden input for location validation. Pronouns and AI policy fields are implemented as custom cards.

fields.question: Please list your name pronunciation so our team can address you correctly.
How did you first hear about Ethena? If an Ethena team member brought you here, we'd love to know who so we can thank them, so please do give them a shoutout.
Why are you interested in joining Ethena?
This role will require a background check. This will take place once the offer has been extended. If you have any concerns, please let us know or note N/A.
Do you now, or will you in the future require VISA sponsorship to work in the United States?

Ethena is a remote-first organization and is currently hiring for candidates based in approved locations noted in the job description. If you are selected for this role, you must be able to work and reside in one of these approved locations for the duration of your employment. Please confirm whether you’ll be able to work and reside from one of Ethena’s approved locations for the duration of your employment with Ethena.
options: Yes (located in the U.S. and not located in Montana)
No (located outside the U.S. or located in Montana)

fields.question: Please indicate where you would be located for this role

Ethena does not allow the use of AI tools during interviews, including note takers, transcription tools, or recordings. Candidates must disclose any AI use during the interview process. Failure to comply may result in removal from the recruitment process.
options: I acknowledge that I have read and understand Ethena’s AI policy for interviews.
